title: A Day of Perfection
overview: Mysterious figures in dark suits absconded with Jaye. An angry Waai Fu immediately gave chase. But an unharmed Jaye suddenly said: Excuse me, Waai Fu, but your fury is misplaced.

title: A Cup of Tequila
overview: Having just reached his young adulthood, Aak accompanied Lee in a business negotiation and emptied a glass of fırewater. The world around him took on a surreal turn. When it all ended, there was nothing but a piercing headache and Lee lamenting his emptied purse.

title: A Night of Rain
overview: A former acquaintance not seen for many years braved the rains and came for a visit and a meal. Hung wanted to talk ahout the past, yet the visitor left with takeaways without farewell.

title: A Lapping of Waves
overview: High summer calls for fun on the beach. Lee suddenly noticed an old friend with her child playing in the sea. Conflicted emotions welled up within.

title: A Minute of Investigation
overview: A lady tearfully begged for the rightful share of her husband's property. The people pointed at her and said: A shameless liar, if I've ever seen one.

title: A Day We Love Best
overview: The mysterious Don Felino kidnapped Aak and sowed chaos to turn the tides. Lee calmly outsmarted the felon, exposed his true identity, and forced him to flee.
